title: Disk headroom is too low for reliable builds
fix: Run `bash cleanup.sh --dry-run` to see reclaimable user data.
Run `bash cleanup.sh --force` if the machine can be reset.
Increase the VM disk allocation if cleanup is not enough.

title: Network connectivity is unavailable
fix: Confirm outbound internet access from the Mac host.
Re-run `ping 8.8.8.8` and inspect provider firewall or NAT rules.
If this is a fleet issue, mark the machine unavailable for new sessions.

title: Xcode is missing from the machine image
fix: Install Xcode in the golden image through the GUI once.
Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 1` after installation completes.

title: Xcode command-line tools are not usable
fix: Run `sudo xcode-select -switch /Applications/Xcode.app` if Xcode exists.
Accept the license with `sudo xcodebuild -license accept`.
Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 1`.

title: iOS simulator runtime is unavailable
fix: Open Xcode and install the required iOS runtime once in the image.
Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 1` to verify the Apple toolchain.

title: Flutter SDK is missing or unusable
fix: Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 2`.
Check that Homebrew and PATH updates landed in `~/.zprofile`.

title: Ruby version is below the supported baseline
fix: Install or repair Homebrew Ruby.
Ensure the Homebrew Ruby bin path is ahead of system Ruby in PATH.
Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 2`.

title: CocoaPods is missing or broken
fix: Install CocoaPods from the Homebrew Ruby environment.
Verify `pod --version` works in a fresh shell.
Re-run `bash bootstrap.sh --from 2`.

title: GitHub CLI is unavailable
fix: Install GitHub CLI with Homebrew.
Run `gh auth login` during onboarding.

title: No SSH key is present for repository access
fix: Generate a key with `ssh-keygen -t ed25519`.
Add the public key to GitHub before cloning private repositories.

title: tmux is unavailable for session persistence
fix: Install tmux with Homebrew.
Re-run the agent layer if session persistence is part of the tier.
